new_candidates.description: Faction sigma-leverage is NON-UNIFORM across the faction stat range (armature A6, computed MC). Bare-stat pool => baseline = stat, so sigma-leverage ~ 1/sqrt(stat): 0.354/pt at stat 2 (+17pct vs 0.30 ref) decaying to 0.189/pt at stat 7 (-37pct, OUT OF BAND low). A point of stat buys decaying leverage as the faction strengthens, compounding the post-F2-ruling punching-up wall (strong rivals hard to act on AND strong-faction stat investment leverage-poor). Distinct from ED-868 (collapse loops) and the artifact-error ED-865/866; this is the underlying attribute-economy property. Aggregating the faction pool (cf. mass-battle ER-9) flattens it.

Mass-battle Command sigma-leverage is HIGH at low Command (armature A6, computed): 0.500/pt at Cmd 2 decaying to in-band at Cmd 4-7. Low-Command early-game generals get oversized per-point leverage. Closes attribute_weight_standard GAP #2 (was magnitude-unverified). Same 1/sqrt(baseline) mechanism as ED-874; non-uniform across range.

Trigger-5 firing is NON-MONOTONIC in faction strength because Condition C stacks a pool-size cliff (pool >= 6) onto a magnitude threshold (net <= -2). Computed firing rate by defender pool (recovery-independent MC): Cmd-1 (2D)=0pct [Cond A blocks], Cmd-2 (4D)=1.9pct [needs rare net<=-2], Cmd-3 (6D)=16.6pct [pool>=6 auto-fires C on ANY failure], declining to ~8pct for strong factions. A single Command point (Cmd 2->3) jumps battle->Stability exposure 8.7x. Mid-tier factions are MOST exposed to battle-driven Stability loss; the weakest are shielded. Consider smoothing C (e.g. severity scaled by margin rather than a hard pool>=6 auto-fire). Corrects the earlier hand-traced assumption that weak-faction battles drive a deterministic Stability spiral (CC-2).

Faction Accounting Stability-RECOVERY mechanic is unspecified or unlocated in the canon read this session. It is the missing damper that every faction-collapse analysis implicitly depends on (F3 anti-death-spiral floor, F5 decrease>increase asymmetry, F6 collapse loop, and the compound-collapse sim CC-4). The compound-sim sensitivity sweep shows collapse-magnitude is DOMINATED by this unspecified mechanic (a placeholder conditional-recovery model failed sanity at 21pct strong-faction collapse; the ER-9 counterfactual inverted as an artifact). Until the canonical recovery mechanic is located (faction_layer Accounting steps 1-13) or specified, no faction-collapse-RATE result is trustworthy. PREREQUISITE for quantifying ED-867/868/F3/F5/F6 and re-running the compound sim.
new_candidates.jordan_decision: pending — locate or specify recovery mechanic

new_candidates.description: Threadwork FR (Lock/Dissolution) Coherence surcharge contradiction (T2). threadwork_v30 §3.2 base table: FR Lock/Dissolution any scale = -1 additional, Lock/Dissolution minimum total -2. Same section PP-196 PROVISIONAL revises to -1 total at Object/Personal (FR surcharge only, scale cost 0). Both values in current canon side-by-side. Decide: ratify PP-196 (update base table) or strike PP-196 (preserve -2 minimum).

Combat secondary consistency items (consolidated, C3/C5/C6). C3: out-of-bounds x Pool-Floor-5 interaction underspecified (does the floor apply when a combatant is pushed OOB?). C5: Health super-linear at low Endurance via (End+6)(MW+1) MW step (now also captured quantitatively in ED-826 + the I-1 win-rate refinement below). C6: Strength damage-multiplier vs Power terminology ambiguity. Combat is mechanically sound (NERS PASS); these are clarity/consistency, not balance.

refinements_to_existing.note: MW-cap win-RATE/build-economy framing (I-1, combat sim): +1 Agility ~ +1 Endurance at low builds (73pct vs 71.5pct) but at high builds +1 Agi=+23pp vs +1 End=+4pp because MaxWounds caps at End 4; past the cap a min-maxer caps Endurance at 4 and dumps into Agility, distorting the attribute economy toward offense. Gives ED-826's Health-curve finding a concrete win-rate cost; argues for the continuous-Health option (no MW step). Confidence: direction high, magnitude sim-specific (confirm vs full combat sim).
continuity correction also pre-existing as ED-515; ED-873 (mine) and ED-515 cover the same fix (Ob-0.5) — flag for the consolidation owner to merge/cross-reference rather than carry two.

deferred_pending_verification: SC3 genre-weight 0.5 near-inert (D-01), SC4 Regroup-on-Spent (D-04), SC5 Focus-1 Regroup trap (D-05): NOT filed — status needs a currency check first (these are pre-flagged 2026-04-08 stress-test items whose post-patch status is unverified). File only after verifying against current social_contest canon.
T7 COMPOSURE-DRIFT: already in live ledger (do not re-file).
